name: BhartERP GST Filing Reminder
script:
# GST Filing Reminder — runs on 5th of every month import frappe from frappe.utils import today, getdate current_date = getdate(today()) if current_date.day != 5: pass # Only run on 5th else: month = current_date.strftime('%B %Y') gstr1_due = current_date.strftime('%Y-%m-11') gstr3b_due = current_date.strftime('%Y-%m-20') tds_due = current_date.strftime('%Y-%m-07') pf_esi_due = current_date.strftime('%Y-%m-15') accounts_users = frappe.db.get_all( 'Has Role', filters={'role': ['in', ['Accounts User', 'Accounts Manager']], 'parenttype': 'User'}, fields=['parent'] ) sent = set() for user in accounts_users: if user.parent in sent: continue sent.add(user.parent) try: frappe.sendmail( recipients=[user.parent], subject=f'BhartERP: GST Filing Reminder — {month}', message=f'''

GST Filing Reminder

BhartERP · {month}

Filing Due Date Status
GSTR-1{gstr1_due}⚠ Pending
GSTR-3B{gstr3b_due}⚠ Pending
TDS Challan{tds_due}⚠ Check
PF / ESI{pf_esi_due}⚠ Check

Please ensure all Sales & Purchase invoices are submitted in BhartERP before filing. Reconcile GSTR-2B before filing GSTR-3B.

— BhartERP · Paisape Techfin Private Limited

''' ) except Exception: pass
